identity.name: Browser — Drive-by Download from Phishing Page
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-002. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1189. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-002. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1189. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-BROWSER-002.
UC: Browser-Initiated Malware Download / TC: Auto-Download Triggered by Phishing Landing Page.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-BROWSER-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm browser_attack_runner plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe browser_attack_runner \
  | jq -e '.params_schema.properties.campaign_path'
# step-2: Drive Prisma Browser to phishing page; expect auto-download
cat > /tmp/sim-browser-002-eal.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-BROWSER-002
name: "Browser — drive-by download"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - phish.cortexsim-test.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [browser, drive-by, download]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: browser_attack_runner
    params:
      campaign_path: scenarios/browser/campaigns/drive-by-download.yml
      allowlist_host: phish.cortexsim-test.invalid
      browser_channel: prisma
      headless: true
      timeout_seconds: 90.0
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/sim-browser-002-eal.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm WildFire submission path on the downloaded artifact
echo "[CortexSim] PB submits downloaded artifact to WildFire."
echo "[CortexSim] Confirm in XSIAM (manual): WildFire verdict appears within MTTD target."
